crisis_scenarios.name: 2022 Bear Market
crisis_scenarios.description: S&P 500 fell ~25% over ~9 months (~190 trading days)

crisis_scenarios.name: Flash Crash (Single Day)
crisis_scenarios.description: Sudden 10% drawdown in a single trading session

crisis_scenarios.name: VIX Spike (15 → 65)
crisis_scenarios.description: VIX quadruples over 5 days; credit spreads widen sharply

position_size_pct.label: Position Size (% of account)
position_size_pct.description: Risk per trade as pct of account (risk.max_risk_per_trade)

stop_loss_multiplier.label: Stop Loss Multiplier
stop_loss_multiplier.description: Stop loss as multiple of credit received

iv_rank_threshold.label: IV Rank Entry Threshold
iv_rank_threshold.description: Minimum IV rank to enter a trade (strategy.min_iv_rank)

profit_target_pct.label: Profit Target (%)
profit_target_pct.description: Close at this % of max profit (risk.profit_target)

spread_width.label: Spread Width ($)
spread_width.description: Width between short and long strikes
